exploration_notes: The SpiderMonkey JS-to-bytecode pipeline flows through these key files: (1) **BytecodeCompiler.cpp/.h** is the top-level entry point — functions like `CompileGlobalScript` and `CompileGlobalScriptToStencilAndMaybeInstantiate` orchestrate the full compile pipeline. (2) **TokenStream.cpp/.h** provides lexical analysis, tokenizing JS source text. (3) **Parser.cpp/.h** implements the recursive-descent parser via the `GeneralParser` template class hierarchy (ParserSharedBase → ParserBase → PerHandler
